runners.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but swamped late when a close up fourth (19.89) at Healesville over 350m. Will be tested in this company.

runners.formComment: Finished second last start (17.49) at big odds over 300m at Healesville. Drawn close to the inside. Prefer others.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a T3 Grade 7 on April 6 over 390m at this track behind Aston Flamenco beaten 6 lengths (22.95). Capable of taking this out.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time when seventh (23.21) at Shepparton in a Rank Limit - Grade 7. Will jump from box 6 for the first time. Key chance and should go close.
